title: CT15.N20 completed discharge record — Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT15.N20, the assertion node “Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger” of tactic CT15 (Rank forcing). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT15.N20. It must be exactly `CT15`, selecting Rank forcing (rank) as the tactic that owns the assertion step “Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger”. It must be exactly `CT15.N20` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT15.N20 within tactic CT15 (Rank forcing). It must be exactly 20, matching the N20 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT15.N20. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the assertion obligation “Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT15.N20. The array must contain `S-Prove`, `S-Trig`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Prove` to occur in CT15.N20's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence for the obligation “Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger”.

Requires `S-Trig` to occur in CT15.N20's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that checks that a payload supplies the receiving tactic's trigger, arity, interfaces, and standing hypotheses for the obligation “Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT15.N20 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Prove (proposition, assumptions, evidence); S-Trig (payloadId, consumerTacticId, expectedArity, componentChecks, standingHypotheses, interfaceChecks, certificateHandleChecks, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Prove` evidence instance at CT15.N20. It must be exactly `S-Prove`, identifying the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence; the same instance must supply proposition, assumptions, evidence.

Contract discriminator for a `S-Trig` evidence instance at CT15.N20. It must be exactly `S-Trig`, identifying the contract that checks that a payload supplies the receiving tactic's trigger, arity, interfaces, and standing hypotheses; the same instance must supply payloadId, consumerTacticId, expectedArity, componentChecks, standingHypotheses, interfaceChecks, certificateHandleChecks, evidence.

statement.informal: Prove or verify: Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
